# Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. For anything beyond a small fix, please open an issue first. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and they verify real behavior
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer stan` passes (PHPStan level max)
- [ ] `composer lint` passes (Laravel Pint)
- [ ] README and `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) updated if the public API or behavior changed
- [ ] No backward-incompatible public API changes (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] No credentials/secrets in code, tests, or fixtures
